title: Generate an ASCII Art Representation of a Complex Algorithm
scenario: Create an ASCII art representation of a complex algorithm that showcases its steps and logic flow. The ASCII art should be a diagram that allows users to visualize the algorithm's structure and understand its execution path. Include a legend to explain the different symbols and their meanings.
constraints: Must be generated using a recursive function
Must have a maximum of 50 lines

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the ASCII art adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the ASCII art accurately represent the algorithm's logic flow?
Is the ASCII art easy to understand and navigate?
Is the recursive function used to generate the ASCII art efficient and well-optimized?
